title: libc_setenv/unsetenv duplicated across two crates
description: The libc_setenv and libc_unsetenv helpers (inline extern "C" declarations for POSIX setenv/unsetenv) are copied verbatim in wolftpm/src/device.rs and wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs. Because wolftpm-tss depends on wolftpm (or both are workspace crates), this should live once — either in a shared internal module in wolftpm re-exported to the sibling crate, or as a tiny private workspace crate. The current duplication means any future fix (e.g. error handling, Windows stub) must be applied in two places.
